form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of four-and-a-half months. Finished off last campaign fourth of 11 at Ballarat Bm84 December 6 over 1400m, soft track; 2.5 len behind Waimarie with 56.5kg at $5. Previous preparation first-up won by head Sandown-Lakeside 2yo+ Bm70 June 1 over 1200m defeating Miss Tallchief with 59.5kg at $10. Better over a touch further but has the class.
